title: diasperus tenellus
intro: Diasperus tenellus, also known as the Chinese angelica, is a flowering plant native to China, belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Diasperus tenellus include reducing fever, relieving headaches and body aches, and improving digestion, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and promote blood circulation. Diasperus tenellus is typically prepared as a tea, decoction, or infusion, and it can also be used in dried or fresh form in herbal remedies and supplements.
